positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of majestic mountain peaks and celestial constellations. The style is modern geometric minimalism with heavy use of clean silhouettes and strong, defined linework. Use a dramatic color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and midnight navy, contrasted sharply with glowing accents of gold and cream. The composition must be central and balanced, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Focus on intricate yet simple patterns, including stylized crescent moons and abstract star clusters, giving the print a cohesive, tapestry-like appearance. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
